prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PARACORDBRACELETKIT-1OPC Product Type: CORD_ROPE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Paracord Bracelet Making Kit with Buckles Assorted Camo Pattern 10pc Description: Construct your own colored paracord bracelets with the ASR Outdoor Paracord Bracelet Kit.

This kit comes with 10 different colored camo pattern paracords, all of which are 10 feet in length. Each paracord length also comes with a matching buckle set so you can fasten your bracelet once you've constructed it. The cords are all made of 7 strands, ensuring their durability, and they have a pull capacity of 550lbs. This is a great kit for hiking, camping, boating, bug out bags and more. Search Terms: camping hiking paracord cord bracelets survival outdoor rope parachute camouflage tactical him military accessories polyester tool archery shooting hunting optics Para-Cord strap bracelet multitool adjustable clasp escape ultralight utility survivor Features: - MAKES 10 BRACELETS - Set of Assorted Camo Colors | Bright Colors for Unique Look - 10 FEET OF PARACORD - Each Bracelet Unravels to 10 Feet of Paracord | Use for First Aid, Fishing and Securing - 550LBS PULL CAPACITY - Bracelets Will Support up to 550 Pounds | Great for Boating, Camping and Hiking - 7 STRAND CORDAGE - Made of 7 Durable and Strong Strands | Stands the Test of Time - MATCHING BUCKLES - Set Comes with 10 Colored Buckles to Complete Bracelets === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10-pc Paracord Bracelet Making Kit Camo
